name: infoops
description: Codex and OpenClaw compatible InfoOps skill for turning workstream signals into structured operational awareness and action priorities.

interface.shortDescription: Structure workstream signals into operational awareness.
interface.longDescription: InfoOps provides a Codex plugin and OpenClaw-compatible standalone skill for maintaining a workspace/infoops system: collecting and classifying workstream signals, refreshing a PULSE view, tracking sources and threads, and turning information flow into action priorities.
defaultPrompt: 帮我看看 workspace/infoops 最近什么情况。
